name: CAPITAL SOUTHWEST CORP
business: Capital Southwest Corp is an internally managed closed-end, non-diversified investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC). It specializes in providing customized debt and equity financing to lower middle market companies in a broad range of industry segments located primarily in the United States. It invests primarily in first lien debt securities, secured by security interests in portfolio company assets, and also invests in equity interests.
